## Source: ghsa-malware (d0f9b3e4d459a433398285978332fca6cdc52d8e50cc579b9acccc0a2ac6d279)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (d4d13afb7306711deba7679787e9c867a3285ab9deabbf0d1efcf452427cd004)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'dependency_confusion123' @ 9.9.9 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
